tr.td: 60 ACTUAT Fluticasone propionate 0.25 MG/ACTUAT / salmeterol 0.05 MG/ACTUAT Dry Powder Inhaler
Albuterol (as albuterol sulfate) 5 mg/mL solution for inhalation
2.5 mg (0.5 mL of 5 mg/mL solution) via nebulizer every 4 to 6 hours as needed
Ferrous sulfate 325 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (325 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Hepatitis A virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease clinical management plan

ul.li: Minimize the number of acute COPD exacerbations requiring medical intervention over the next 12 months
Achieve better control of dyspnea, cough, and sputum production as measured by patient-reported outcomes
Maintain or improve forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1)
Reduce the number of hospital admissions due to COPD exacerbations over the next year
Maintain fasting blood glucose within the recommended range for prediabetes.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below the threshold for diabetes diagnosis.

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional

display.value: Disease caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (disorder)

tr.td: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease clinical management plan

ul.li: Minimize the number of acute COPD exacerbations requiring medical intervention over the next 12 months
Achieve better control of dyspnea, cough, and sputum production as measured by patient-reported outcomes
Maintain or improve forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1)
Reduce the number of hospital admissions due to COPD exacerbations over the next year

ul.li: Maintain fasting blood glucose within the recommended range for prediabetes.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below the threshold for diabetes diagnosis.
